sn22.118:1.1: Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Taṁ kiṁ maññatha, bhikkhave, rūpaṁ ‘etaṁ mama, esohamasmi, eso me attā’ti samanupassathā"ti?
sn22.118:1.2:
"No hetaṁ, bhante".
"Sādhu, bhikkhave. Rūpaṁ, bhikkhave, ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ.
sn22.118:1.3:
vedanāṁ … saññaṁ … saṅkhāre … viññāṇaṁ ‘etaṁ mama, esohamasmi, eso me attā’ti samanupassathā"ti?
"No hetaṁ, bhante".
sn22.118:1.4:
"Sādhu, bhikkhave. Viññāṇaṁ, bhikkhave, ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ … pe … evaṁ passaṁ … pe … nāparaṁ itthattāyāti pajānātī"ti.
Chaṭṭhaṁ.
